scripts.build: pnpm --filter @deploypilot/shared build && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/ui build && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/api build && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @deploypilot/shared build && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/ui build && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/web typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @deploypilot/shared lint && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/ui lint && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/api lint && pnpm --filter @deploypilot/web lint
